title: pilosella tenebricans
intro: Pilosella tenebricans, also known as Devil's-bit scabious, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella tenebricans include the treatment of various conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
